chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1548 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 06.03.2025 Mr. Ubedullah Ghoto, Advocate for the petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
